title: Spooqui's Hearty UI
description:
It changes the hearts to have softer colours and also replaces the hunger bar with a coffee cup :)

First resource pack! Expect inconsistencies and messy stuff. Nevertheless I put plenty of passion into it and I hope someone gets to enjoy it :3
body: My first resource pack! It might kind of suck, but I was really passionate about it! I hope anyone that ends up finding it actually enjoys it as much as I enjoyed the process of doing each heart :3
